checklist_item.obligation: Identify the hidden e33-obstructed family as a SAT-complete or polynomially faithful representative family.
checklist_item.pass_condition: The reduction has polynomial overhead and preserves yes/no instances without using hidden-sector advice.
checklist_item.required_artifact: Reduction certificate with source problem, target encoding, size bound, and inverse witness interpretation.

decision.reason: The encoded-family bridge is explicitly downgraded to representative/current-trace scope until a real reduction or polynomial-faithfulness certificate is added.

declared_scope.meaning: The current evidence may be read as a representative/current-trace no-escape certificate for the accepted public proof-log and public DPLL fixtures, not as a SAT-complete family bridge.
declared_scope.non_claim: This certificate does not prove SAT-completeness, polynomial faithfulness of the hidden e33-obstructed family, arbitrary solver universality, an X-extractor lower bound, or P != NP.

encoded_family_bridge.reason: No reduction certificate with source problem, target encoding, polynomial size bound, yes/no preservation, and inverse witness interpretation is present in the canonical integrity data.

next_highest_yield_item.action: Lift pure-C no-escape from current accepted traces to the universal trace vocabulary.

promotion_requirements: name the source SAT-complete problem or source family
define the target hidden e33-obstructed encoding
prove a polynomial size and construction-time bound
prove that the reduction uses no hidden-sector advice
connect the reduction certificate to the C/V/X trace and no-escape ledger
